metadata.description: Open any previously rated title on IMDb, click the Rate button, then 'Remove rating' — verifying the DeleteTitleRating mutation fires.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On IMDb, find any title you have previously rated, open its page, click the Rate button, and then click 'Remove rating' to delete your rating.
